_comment: BOOK_SPEC_EXAMPLE.json — A valid sample instance that validates against BOOK_SPEC_SCHEMA.json (Draft 7). Based on the Spin of Gravity walkthrough in PRODUCTION_WALKTHROUGH.md. All calculated fields use LULU_SPEC formulas verbatim.
title: The Spin of Gravity
subtitle: A Field-Theoretic Introduction to Spin and Non-Locality
author: Michael Straughan

metadata.spine_calculation_note: Paperback formula per LULU_SPEC §5.1: spine_in = (page_count / 444) + 0.06. Calculation: (220 / 444) + 0.06 = 0.4955 + 0.06 = 0.5555 in. Rounded to 0.5555 in. Note: page_count_estimate is 220 pages; if actual typeset page count differs, spine width must be recalculated.
metadata.gutter_calculation_note: LULU_SPEC §4 Gutter Addition Table: page_count_estimate = 220, which falls in the 151-400 range. Gutter addition = 0.5 in. Recommended total inside margin = 1.0 in (0.5 in base safety margin + 0.5 in gutter addition). Set margins.inside_inches = 1.0 in, gutter_inches = 0.5.
metadata.page_count_note: Estimated from: body pages = ceil(52400 words / 250 words-per-page) = ceil(209.6) = 210. Front matter: 5 files × 1 page avg = 5 pages (TOC estimated 2 pages for a 3-chapter book, so 6 total). Back matter: 3 files × 1-2 pages avg = 4 pages. Total estimate = 210 + 6 + 4 = 220. Rounded to 220 (divisible by 4 per LULU_SPEC §9 recommendation). LULU_PIPELINE calculates actual page count during typesetting.
metadata.pdf_standard_note: Set to 'lulu_joboptions' per LULU_SPEC §6. LULU_SPEC §6 carries an [UNVERIFIED] marker: the specific PDF/X version (e.g., PDF/X-1a:2001 vs PDF/X-3:2002) is not explicitly named in Lulu's public documentation as of 2026-04-18. Use Lulu's proprietary .joboptions export preset when exporting from Adobe InDesign, Photoshop, or Acrobat Distiller. Verify with Lulu before final production.

cover_spread_dimensions.formula_note: LULU_SPEC §7 Cover Spread Formula. cover_width = (2 × 6) + 0.5555 + (2 × 0.125) = 12 + 0.5555 + 0.25 = 12.8055 in (≈ 12.806). cover_height = 9 + (2 × 0.125) = 9.25 in. Note: spine_width used here is the estimated value; recalculate cover spread after final typeset page count is known.

lulu_spec_unverified_items: pdf_standard: specific PDF/X version not published by Lulu (LULU_SPEC §6 [UNVERIFIED])
per_paper_type_spine_coefficient: coefficient breakdown for 60# Cream vs 60# White vs 80# White not published; single-coefficient formula (divisor 444) used per LULU_SPEC §5.1 Note [UNVERIFIED]
hardcover_maximum_pages: 800-page maximum inferred from end of spine table, not explicitly stated for hardcover (LULU_SPEC §9 Note) [UNVERIFIED]
coil_saddle_stitch_page_limits: minimum and maximum page counts not published in accessible documentation (LULU_SPEC §9 Note) [UNVERIFIED]
required_author_actions: cover_file: No cover spread PDF has been generated. Cover file must be designed and produced separately conforming to LULU_SPEC §7 cover spread formula and LULU_SPEC §12 cover file requirements.
isbn: ISBN not yet assigned. Assign ISBN before final print order; update BOOK_SPEC.json and front/copyright.md.
fonts: Font selection is Palatino Linotype (declared). Verify font is licensed for commercial use and will embed correctly per LULU_SPEC §12 Font Requirements.
